description.ko: 유기적 형태가 날카로운 기하학적 평면과 디지털 노이즈로 해체된 쿠로-X의 정교한 표현으로, 물리적 현실과 데이터 스트림 사이에 갇힌 의식을 상징합니다.
description.en: A sophisticated representation of KURO-X where organic forms are deconstructed into sharp geometric planes and digital noise, symbolizing a consciousness caught between physical reality and data streams.

prompt: Full body portrait of KURO-X, minimalist cyberpunk aesthetic, geometric glitch art style, fragmented silhouettes, floating vector polygons, digital artifacts, sharp edges, chromatic aberration, deep void background, neon cyan and monochrome accents, ultra-high resolution, hyper-stylized digital rendering
